intro: Sporoxeia petelotii, also known as Bồ hòn, is a plant species in the family Annonaceae, commonly found in tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in treating various ailments including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Sporoxeia petelotii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
